seoDescription: Find answers to common questions about our software development process, timelines, and post-launch support.
headline: COMMON QUESTIONS

timeline.question: How long does a typical project take?
timeline.answer: Project timelines vary based on scope and complexity. A standard MVP typically takes 4-8 weeks, while comprehensive enterprise systems may take 3-6 months. We work in agile sprints to deliver value as quickly as possible.

support.question: Do you provide support after launch?
support.answer: Yes, we offer continuous technical support, maintenance, and scalability optimizations. We function as your long-term technical partner, ensuring your product remains secure and performs well as your user base grows.

integration.question: Can you connect with our existing systems and databases?
integration.answer: Absolutely. We specialize in building secure integrations and data pipelines that connect seamlessly with your legacy systems, third-party APIs, and existing databases to ensure smooth operations.
